[[File:Droids.jpg|thumb|250px|An L2 labor droid (left), with a [[K5 Enforcer Droid]] (center) and a [[4XB Programmer Droid|4xB Programmer Droid]] (right).]]
'''L2 Base Labor Droids''' were [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droids]] designed by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]]. L2 units were able to perform tasks with up to 100 separate steps. An L2 was equipped with two heavy [[Grasper arm/Legends|grasper arms]], one retractable fine work grasper arm, two tractor feet, a small [[Circular saw/Legends|circular saw]], and [[Audio sensor/Legends|auditory]] and [[Photoreceptor/Legends|visual recorders]]. L2 units were used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to maintain the prison complexes of [[Balis-Baurgh]]. [[Hardin (spacer)|Hardin]] owned a modified L2.<ref name="EBB" />
